title: This, And The Next World.
content:
God hath this world for many made, 'tis true:
    But He hath made the World to Come for few.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "This, And The Next World.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
